steps.title: Compare the study designs
steps.content: SAGE needs extensive funding because it tracks long-term trends by collecting data over long timescales and at repeated intervals. The sociology study is more constrained because it seeks a single average age for a given city.

steps.title: Choose the funding reason
steps.content: Choice A discusses priority for funding, not what the study requires. Choice B focuses on participant count, and Choice C speculates about expanding the study. The real difference is that a single average does not require following changes over time, so the funding demand is lower. The answer is D.
